title: Customer Segmentation and Lookalike Audience Workflow

ai.summary: This workflow outlines the process of resolving customer identifiers, enriching profiles, analyzing attributes, clustering, and building lookalike audience
ai.whatItShows: A detailed workflow for customer segmentation and lookalike audience generation, starting from raw customer identifiers, proceeding through data enrichment, attribute analysis, clustering, and finally to targeting strategy selection and audience activation. It highlights steps like 'resolve_identities', 'get_person', 'Analyze Attributes', 'list_clusters', and 'find_persons'.
ai.whenToUse: Use this workflow when you need to understand customer similarities, identify market segments and personas, build lookalike audiences for marketing campaigns, or optimize customer acquisition targeting.
ai.howToAdapt: This workflow can be adapted by integrating different data sources, applying alternative attribute analysis or clustering algorithms, modifying the targeting logic (precision, reach, hybrid), or connecting to various activation platforms for campaign deployment.
